forecast-period.text: A cold front over eastern districts will move to the east of SA overnight. The low pressure system associated with this front is expected to move slowly eastwards over waters to the south of the state and will extend a trough over southern parts of SA later Sunday and Monday. The low will then move over Bass Strait later Monday. A ridge will extend across SA from the west on Tuesday and a cold front will move across the south later Wednesday.
Wind and wave forecasts are averages. Wind gusts can be 40 per cent stronger than the forecast, and stronger still in squalls and thunderstorms. Maximum waves can be twice the forecast height.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones. Marine forecasts are also available on VHF and HF radio. View the radio schedule on www.bom.gov.au/marine
Check the latest Coastal Waters Forecasts for information on wind, wave and weather conditions for neighbouring coastal zones.

area.description: Far West Coast: WA-SA Border to Fowlers Bay

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Saturday for Far West Coast
forecast-period.text: West to southwesterly 20 to 25 knots, reaching up to 30 knots in the late afternoon.
2 to 2.5 metres.
Southwesterly 2 to 3 metres, increasing to 2.5 to 4 metres later in the evening.
Cloudy. 90% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm offshore.
Westerly 20 to 25 knots turning southwesterly in the early afternoon.
1.5 to 2 metres.
South to southwesterly 3 to 4 metres.
Partly cloudy. 95% chance of showers.
Southwesterly 15 to 20 knots turning southerly 10 to 15 knots in the late afternoon.
1 to 2 metres, decreasing to 1 metre during the afternoon.
South to southwesterly 2.5 to 3 metres.
Below 0.5 metres, tending southerly 1 to 1.5 metres during the morning, then increasing to 1 to 2 metres later in the evening.
Cloudy. 60% chance of showers.
Southerly 10 to 15 knots decreasing to about 10 knots during the morning.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2.5 metres.
Southerly 1.5 metres, decreasing to around 1 metre during the evening.
Partly cloudy.

area.description: Upper West Coast: Fowlers Bay to Elliston

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Saturday for Upper West Coast
forecast-period.text: Westerly 20 to 25 knots, reaching up to 30 knots in the late afternoon.
2 to 2.5 metres.
Southwesterly 2 to 3 metres, increasing to 3 to 4 metres south of Streaky Bay later in the evening.
Cloudy. 80% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm offshore.

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Sunday for Upper West Coast
forecast-period.text: Westerly 20 to 25 knots, reaching up to 30 knots during the morning and early afternoon. Winds turning southwesterly 15 to 20 knots in the evening.
1.5 to 2.5 metres.
Southwesterly 4 to 5 metres.
Partly cloudy. 95% chance of showers.
Southwesterly 15 to 20 knots turning southerly 10 to 15 knots in the evening.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to 1 metre during the afternoon.
Southwesterly 3 to 4 metres, decreasing to 3 metres around midday.
Partly cloudy. 70% chance of showers.
Southerly 10 to 15 knots decreasing to below 10 knots during the evening.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 2 to 3 metres, decreasing to 2 metres during the evening.
Southerly 1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to around 1 metre during the evening.
Cloudy.

area.description: Lower West Coast: Elliston to Cape Carnot

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Saturday for Lower West Coast
forecast-period.text: West to northwesterly 25 to 30 knots becoming westerly 20 to 25 knots in the evening then increasing to 20 to 30 knots in the late evening.
2 to 3 metres.
Westerly 2.5 to 3 metres, increasing to 2.5 to 4 metres by early evening, then tending west to southwesterly 4 to 5 metres later in the evening.
Cloudy. 80% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm.

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Sunday for Lower West Coast
forecast-period.text: Westerly 20 to 30 knots turning southwesterly 20 to 25 knots in the evening.
2 to 3 metres.
Southwesterly 4 to 5 metres.
Cloudy. 95% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
Southwesterly 15 to 25 knots decreasing to 10 to 15 knots in the evening.
1.5 to 2 metres, decreasing to 1 to 1.5 metres around midday.
Southwesterly 3 to 4 metres, decreasing to 3 metres around midday.
Cloudy. 80% chance of showers.
South to southwesterly 10 to 15 knots decreasing to below 10 knots during the afternoon.
Around 1 metre.
Southwesterly 2 to 3 metres.
Southeast to southwesterly around 1 metre.
Cloudy.

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Saturday for Central Coast
forecast-period.text: Northwesterly 25 to 30 knots.
2.5 to 3 metres.
Westerly 3 to 5 metres.
Cloudy. 80% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm.

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Sunday for Central Coast
forecast-period.text: West to northwesterly 25 to 30 knots tending west to southwesterly during the day.
2.5 to 3 metres.
Westerly 4 to 6 metres, tending southwesterly 4 to 6 metres during the morning.
Cloudy. Near 100% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm.
West to southwesterly 25 to 30 knots becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 knots before dawn.
1.5 to 2.5 metres, decreasing to 1.5 metres during the afternoon.
Southwesterly 3 to 4 metres, decreasing to 3 metres later in the evening.
Partly cloudy. 90% chance of showers.
South to southwesterly 10 to 15 knots becoming west to southwesterly below 10 knots during the afternoon.
Around 1 metre, decreasing below 0.5 metres during the evening.
Southwesterly 2.5 to 3 metres.
Southerly below 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the afternoon.
Cloudy.
